idea-plugin.name: Typst
idea-plugin.description:
Native Typst language support for IntelliJ-based IDEs.

  • Recognises .typ files as Typst source files.
  • Lexer-based syntax highlighting with customisable colour settings (Settings → Editor → Color Scheme → Typst).
  • Recoverable parser and PSI that keeps the editor usable on incomplete or malformed input.
  • Conservative code formatter — normalises spacing and indentation inside closed code groups (including multi-line blocks, arrays and dictionaries) while preserving markup prose. Indentation follows Settings → Code Style → Typst.
  • Brace matching for (), {} and [], and code folding for closed multi-line blocks, groups and content blocks.
  • Line-comment toggling (//) via the standard Code → Comment with Line Comment action.
  • Go To Declaration (Cmd/Ctrl+Click): file-local variables and functions, @reference to its <label>, relative #import paths and imported names, and Typst standard-library builtins.

This is an MVP release. Completion, cross-package @preview imports, documentation lookup, and Typst rendering are not included.
